title: Threateningly mobs
description: Bring more obstacles to your survival.
body:
## ![Threateningly mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/692007048e9cc2ed9526c0f6d87e0316575da1f1.jpeg)
## 
## **Please do not install this mod on an existing save file. This mod includes biomes and dimension content,remove it may cause the save file cannot read.**


<details>
<summary>Hypocritical Saint process</summary>

Find the dungeons located in the forest, snowy land, and desert respectively. Enter them and defeat the bosses inside, and each boss will drop its corresponding badge.
![forest_palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e92099eb07c7cfe0f65b0109c6df8140944ecb92.png)
![flame_palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bc938bad57372abd4a2972d468b53a37195feb1.jpeg)
![ice_palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/178e75fb882e4e19eb56903f69add72bbebe3ecd.png)

After collecting all three badges, combine them to create the "Triple Eyes", which serves as the key to unlock the Distortion Dimension.
![key craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04e743824962a5e42bd150b6efe30c4179f224aa.png)

Right-click the summoning stele with “Triple Eyes” to immediately generate a portal frame (consuming the summon stele),then use the “Triple Eyes” again to activate the portal.
![summon_stele](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad77d21493dc83d9017b24bbcad18bb7e667f423.png)
![distortion dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85b6c6d60cae305373e0bfd207b8095059985751.png)

After entering the dimension, you will arrive at the center of the Saint Palace. Hold the " Hypocritical Saint Summon Rune" and right-click the central block to summon the Hypocritical Saint.
![Saint palace in distortion dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a0f047b9a06ff238c81d3f279bbf7abb89db63c.jpeg)
![hypocritical saint rune recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e32bf1e2a5a8ec294f52a6097b2a1419657a8687.png)
</details>



This mod introduces several new mobs designed to make survival significantly more challenging. Specifically, their purpose is to hinder your progress. These mobs often possess unique abilities or resistances, and some may even target your livestock.

Each biome now features 1-2 new creatures, categorized into medium and heavy types. Medium mobs typically have an HP of 40 or more, while heavy mobs boast an HP of 200 or higher. Additionally, some functional utility mobs have been added.

Most of these mobs are hostile toward players, with abilities that make them even more dangerous. Their HP is often several times—or even ten times—that of vanilla mobs, making them formidable opponents. recommended to avoid them whenever possible.

**Threateningly mobs Wiki is writing (20%).**

### **you can get threateningly mobs on curseforge now.** [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/threateningly-mobs)


<details>
<summary>Mobs spawn location</summary>
  
- titan rabbit:Use UltraSummonStone on summon altar(random).

- inferno:Use UltraSummonStone on summon altar(random).

- abyss fang:Use UltraSummonStone on summon altar(only in water).

- terradragon:Use UltraSummonStone on summon altar(random).
  
- nature sprirt: forest,birch forest,dark forest..etc

- earth loong: forest,jungle...etc

- desert bettle: desert,badlands,savanna

- lich: overworld

- moon priest:overworld.

- armor of desert: desert,badlands

- beast horseshoe crab: ocean and beach

- hydra: ocean,river,swamp

- steelboar: savanna,meadow,dark forest,badlands

- regalhart: meadow,taiga,forest

- riptooth: all type ocean,only in night time

- deathworm:desert,snowland.
  
- forest drake:forest.
  
- cannon crab:beach.
  
- cave hunter:overworld cave(y coordinate below 0).
  
- earth drill:overworld cave(y coordinate below 0).
  
- frostbite:snowland.

</details>
